acne.answer: Acne is caused by clogged pores and excess oil. Wash your face twice daily, avoid oily food, and use salicylic acid or benzoyl peroxide products.

dry skin.answer: Dry skin can be improved by using moisturizers with hyaluronic acid, drinking enough water, and avoiding harsh soaps.

pigmentation.answer: Pigmentation can be reduced using sunscreen, vitamin C serum, and retinoids. Avoid excessive sun exposure.

oily skin.answer: Use gel-based cleansers, avoid heavy creams, and wash your face regularly to control excess oil.

dark spots.answer: Dark spots may fade with vitamin C, niacinamide, and sunscreen protection.
